prompt: A candid, naturally-lit color photograph of a 23-year-old woman, shoulder-up portrait, looking directly at the camera with a soft, friendly half-smile. She has shoulder-length light brown hair, light freckles across her nose, warm hazel eyes, no heavy makeup. She is wearing a simple cream-colored knit sweater. Editorial photography style, soft window light from her left side, gentle film-like color grading with slightly muted but warm tones. Background is a softly out-of-focus warm-toned interior — hint of pale wall and a blurred green plant — shallow depth of field, 50mm lens look. Believable, not glamorous, not retouched, looks like a real creative professional in her natural environment. Square crop.
